TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andre_Brown, title = Andre_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andre_Brown} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 5, Andre Brown, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andre Brown mqwas biru sa Brother Rice pqwsan biru seneng. Andre Brown mqwas biru sa Leo Catholic pqwsan biru seneng. Andre Brown, t'aring kawas tay 2000 tehuk kawas tay 2004, mqwas biru sa DePaul pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Andre Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2004, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 5, Andre Brown, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andre Brown mqwas biru sa Brother Rice pqwsan biru seneng. Andre Brown mqwas biru sa Leo Catholic pqwsan biru seneng. Andre Brown, t'aring kawas tay 2000 tehuk kawas tay 2004, mqwas biru sa DePaul pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Andre Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2004, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*re βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja an*re βrown mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βrotħer riʦ~ʨe pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. an*re βrown mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa leo ʦ~ʨatħoliʦ~ʨ pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. an*re βrown, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *epaul pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja an*re βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
